summary: Soundboard of the first set delivers strong Dylan covers and a solid setlist, but suffers from PA‑related muffiness and generation loss.
review: The review praises the historic first‑set soundboard release, especially the rare "Visions of Johanna" and "She Belongs to Me" performances, calling the show itself a 4.5‑star experience. Recording quality is noted as only average (3.5 stars) due to PA problems on "Bucket" and "Stagger Lee" and a slightly thin mix, though the archivist's effort is appreciated.

ai_rating.rationale: High show rating (4.5) weighted heavily versus moderate recording rating (3.5) yields an overall 4.2‑star assessment; only one detailed review gives medium confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: PA problems on "Bucket" and "Stagger Lee" not captured well, board sounds a bit distant, possible extra generation loss causing slight muffiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First‑set only, praised for rare Dylan covers and overall strong setlist; missing second set leaves the release feeling incomplete.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s vocal and guitar work on the Dylan covers is highlighted as a blessing.
